entries.target: Structured source of four egzaminination documents. Pytanies, sekcjas, scoring and egzamininer guidance are edited here and zapiszd as the final egzaminination pakiet.

entries.target: Use latest pakiet from Admin workflow

entries.target: These tools are mainly for migration, backups and technical checks. For routine egzamin preparation, use the main buttons above.

entries.target: Translations were importujed. Rewczytajing the interface.

entries.target: Generate the centre link only when the pakiet is gotowe and the egzamin is otwórz.

entries.target: Wczytaj the .vet pakiet sent by Admin. The pakiet sets the content of tests and forms for further egzamin preparation.

entries.source: Load the .vet package sent by Admin
This step sets the current exam content for the centre. Levels and variants are taken directly from the package.
entries.target: This step sets the aktualny egzamin content for the centre. Levels and variants are taken directly from the pakiet.

entries.source: Load the .vet package sent by Admin
Select VetBara Package 1. The package contains rules, tests and forms for the outdoor session in the relevant language.
entries.target: Select VetBara Pakiet 1. The pakiet contains rules, tests and forms for the outdoor session in the relevant język.

entries.source: The package does not contain Package 1 data.
entries.target: The pakiet does not contain Pakiet 1 data.

entries.target: Service options for audit, manual importuj of older pakiets and operational checks. A normal egzamin run usually does not need them.
